name: LinkedIn Learning API
what_it_does: LinkedIn Learning REST API for professional development content delivery, course completion tracking, skills assessment, and learning analytics within corporate learning programs. Enables AI agents to manage course and learning path assignment for automated professional development workflow, handle learner progress and completion tracking for corporate training analytics, access LinkedIn Learning content catalog search and recommendation for personalized learning automation, retrieve course completion certificates and LinkedIn profile integration for professional development automation, manage learning asset metadata for content library management, handle SSO-based learner provisioning for seamless enterprise learning access, access skills gap analysis and role-based learning recommendation for talent development automation, retrieve completion reporting and manager visibility for L&D business intelligence, manage curated learning path creation for structured development programs, and integrate LinkedIn Learning with Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, Cornerstone, and HRIS for enterprise learning ecosystem.
use_cases: Assigning professional development from HR learning agents
Tracking skills completion from talent development agents
Recommending courses from personalized learning agents
Reporting L&D metrics from workforce analytics agents
not_for: Compliance training with audit trail requirements (use dedicated compliance LMS)
Custom internal content hosting (LinkedIn Learning hosts LinkedIn content only)
Frontline worker microlearning (content is professional/knowledge worker oriented)
best_when: An enterprise organization wanting AI agents to automate professional development content delivery, skills-based learning recommendations, course completion tracking, and learning analytics by leveraging LinkedIn Learning's 21,000+ course library integrated with HRIS and LMS platforms.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE TRAINING AUDIT TRAIL FOR REGULATORY REQUIREMENTS: LinkedIn Learning completion records are not designed as compliance audit trail system of record; automated HIPAA, OSHA, or SEC compliance training tracking via LinkedIn Learning without supplemental LMS record creates regulatory audit gap. CONTENT LICENSE SCOPE AND SEAT COUNT: Automated learner provisioning via LinkedIn Learning API must stay within licensed seat count; automated over-provisioning beyond license creates contractual breach and requires remediation; implement license utilization monitoring in automated provisioning. GDPR EU LEARNER DATA AND MICROSOFT DATA RESIDENCY: LinkedIn Learning learner data is processed by Microsoft (LinkedIn's parent); verify Microsoft Data Processing Agreement GDPR compliance and EU data residency configuration for EU employee learning data; automated EU learner data processing outside EU data center creates GDPR Chapter V issue. LinkedIn profile integration data privacy — automated LinkedIn Learning completion publishing to employee LinkedIn profiles requires explicit employee consent; automated profile update without consent creates privacy violation and potential NLRA concerted activity interference.

auth.notes: LinkedIn Learning uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes via LinkedIn API infrastructure. REST API with JSON. Sunnyvale, California HQ (Microsoft Corporation, NASDAQ: MSFT via LinkedIn acquisition 2016). LinkedIn acquired Lynda.com in 2015 for $1.5B and rebranded as LinkedIn Learning 2016. 21,000+ course library. 27M+ corporate learners. Integration with Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, Cornerstone via LRS (Learning Record Store) and SFTP. Competes with Skillsoft Percipio, Pluralsight, and Coursera for Business for enterprise professional learning content.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier for enterprise — per-seat annual subscription; LinkedIn Premium individual plan includes learning
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise per-seat annual subscription by user count; discounts for volume; Premium individual ($29.99-$39.99/month) includes limited access
pricing.notes: Sunnyvale CA. Microsoft NASDAQ:MSFT (LinkedIn). Lynda.com acquired 2015 ($1.5B). 21,000+ courses. 27M+ corporate learners. Per-seat enterprise annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: LinkedIn API rate limits per application; Learning API calls throttled; no webhooks for completion events

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — COMPLETION EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: LinkedIn Learning does not support native webhooks for course completion; automated compliance training or development milestone workflows require scheduled polling of completion API; implement polling with appropriate interval for business SLA

LINKEDIN OAUTH SCOPE GRANULARITY FOR LEARNING API: LinkedIn Learning API access requires specific OAuth 2.0 scopes (r_learning_classification, r_lms_*); some completion data endpoints require organization-admin OAuth flow, not user-delegated; automated service account must be configured with correct Learning API admin role

CONTENT LICENSE SEAT COUNT ENFORCEMENT: Automated learner provisioning via LinkedIn Learning API must track active seat utilization against contracted license count; automated provisioning without license guard creates over-seat-count contractual breach that requires manual remediation

LRS (Learning Record Store) SFTP for bulk completion data — LinkedIn Learning bulk completion data for large enterprise deployments is delivered via LRS SFTP export rather than real-time API; automated completion tracking for >10,000 learner deployments should use SFTP LRS export rather than per-learner API polling

LinkedIn Learning profile completion and employee privacy — automated publishing of course completions to employee LinkedIn public profiles requires explicit employee opt-in consent; automated profile completion without consent violates employee privacy expectations and potentially NLRA concerted activity protections

GDPR LinkedIn data processing for EU employees — LinkedIn Learning EU employee learning data is processed by Microsoft Ireland Operations Ltd. under Microsoft DPA; verify organizational DPA with Microsoft covers LinkedIn Learning in EU data residency configuration; automated EU learner data routing must be verified through Microsoft/LinkedIn support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Professional learning content. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Employee learning and skills data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Professional learning. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Employee learning and profile data.
